text: The transition from the almost clinical emptiness of the hallway to the colorful vibrancy of the exhibition wall is jarring and invigorating. I feel curiosity waking in me as I try to absorb the shifting atmosphere. There’s a sense of anticipation here, as if I’m about to gain insight into the way we interact with technology and knowledge. The world feels experimental, dynamic, and slightly surreal—each space inviting my philosophical wonder.
